title: BOUNDARY_VIOLATION event payload
description: Error event emitted when an AgentHandoff or BOUNDARY_HANDSHAKE attempt fails precondition checks. Emitted BEFORE BoundaryViolationError or HandshakeError is raised. Governance rationale: Invariant 4 (Reconstructability) — every failure path produces a ledger event; silent failures are prohibited. The rejection_reason is a closed enum so audit reconstruction is machine-verifiable. Rejection reasons are exhaustive of the Sprint-2 precondition surface: source/target registration and activity, session isolation, handshake prerequisite, payload authority, payload discoverability, self-handoff, and auditor pattern at the API boundary.

attempted_source_agent_id.description: source_agent_id from the rejected attempt. Captured verbatim for reconstruction even if the agent is unregistered.

attempted_target_agent_id.description: target_agent_id from the rejected attempt. Captured verbatim for reconstruction even if the agent is unregistered.

attempted_artifact_type.description: Type of boundary event whose emission was rejected.

attempted_payload_artifact_id.description: For AgentHandoff attempts: the payload_artifact_id under attempt. Null for BoundaryHandshake attempts (no payload) or when the attempt lacked the field entirely.

rejection_reason.description: Closed enum of all Sprint-2 boundary rejection reasons. SOURCE_UNREGISTERED/TARGET_UNREGISTERED: agent has no registration record. SOURCE_INACTIVE/TARGET_INACTIVE: agent exists but status is SUSPENDED or REVOKED. CROSS_SESSION: source or target registered in a different session. MISSING_HANDSHAKE: peer-level handoff (SUB_AGENT or VALIDATOR endpoints with no ORCHESTRATOR/HUMAN_PROXY involvement) without a prior BOUNDARY_HANDSHAKE. BINDING_PAYLOAD: payload artifact carries authority_level='binding'. UNKNOWN_PAYLOAD: payload_artifact_id is not discoverable in the agent registry or prior ledger events. SELF_HANDOFF: source_agent_id equals target_agent_id. INVALID_AUDITOR: X-Auditor-Id header failed the AUDITOR_[A-Z0-9_]+ pattern at the API boundary. DISALLOWED_ORIGINATOR_VALIDATOR: VALIDATOR-typed source attempted to originate a handoff to a SUB_AGENT or VALIDATOR target (per Sprint-2 decision e, VALIDATORs may only originate to ORCHESTRATOR or HUMAN_PROXY). DISALLOWED_ORIGINATOR_HUMAN_PROXY: HUMAN_PROXY-typed source attempted to originate a handoff to anything other than ORCHESTRATOR (per Sprint-2 decision f, HUMAN_PROXY may only originate to ORCHESTRATOR to prevent Decision-gate bypass via handoff).

detail.description: Optional free-text detail preserving the original exception message for audit readability. Not a substitute for rejection_reason.
